query:
SELECT u.id, u.name, u.email, u.role, u.activo, u.openId
FROM users u
WHERE u.name LIKE 'U%' OR u.id NOT IN (SELECT usuarioId FROM proyecto_usuarios)
ORDER BY u.id;
command:
